basics.name: Ronak Pradhan
basics.label: Applied Scientist
basics.summary: Applied Scientist focused on large language models, fine-tuning, and applied ML in production. Currently domain-adapting LLMs for healthcare reasoning at Optum. Previously Applied Scientist Intern at Amazon.

work.name: Optum (UnitedHealth Group)
work.summary: Domain-adapting LLMs for sophisticated reasoning on complex healthcare documents.
highlights: Fine-tuned BioClinical BERT with HuggingFace transformers + peft for healthcare textual entailment.
Significantly improved precision on the entailment task.
Dockerized a Flask service and deployed BioClinical BERT on AWS SageMaker as an asynchronous endpoint.

work.name: Amazon
work.summary: Improved product retrieval for Amazon.in with GANs and LLMs over a 100M+ row, terabyte-scale training set.
highlights: +0.4% Precision @ 1% Recall, +0.2% ROC AUC, +0.4% Cold-Start ROC AUC.
Built PySpark + SQL pipelines over 100M+ row, terabyte-scale behavioral logs.
Communicated results to 10+ scientists; iterated based on review feedback.
